aka: Two Lovers In a Glass Wall
trans_title: Two Lovers In a Glass Wall
introduction: SYNOPSISYoon-hee takes care of her sick mother by playing piano in a restaurant. One day, she gets an offer she can't refuse from Han Ji-ho, president of a company, to look after his terminally ill son Min. Yoon-hee agrees to masquerade as Soo-hee, Min's ex-fiancee who left him when he became a vegetable from a car accident. Min, who is also blind, is convinced that Soo-hee is back and finds new strength to live on. Yoon-hee does her best to take care of him by giving him acupressure therapy, which is his only hope for recovery. She begins to actually fall in love with Min. Soon, she finds herself pregnant with his child. Min begins to recover and even gets an eye operation to recover his sight. When Soo-hee returns from the United States, Yoon-hee realizes that her job is done and she leaves Min. Min recovers his sight and finds out the truth. He also realizes that it is Yoon-hee that he loves and he goes to find her.故事打钢琴在餐厅云辉谁是照顾残疾人*的母亲收到我们的报价，以帮助他的儿子闵这种疾病从韩继胡主席放弃一个生命的一天。云辉弃儿通过未婚夫种植的闽人的思维的艺术，以提高医院的母亲找到了别墅转到失去未婚妻离开苏惠他身边带。闵没期待他的未婚妻知道回苏惠对云辉再次刻录生活的意愿，云辉须作出一切真诚帮助按摩师作为最后的手段，以民事再生。与此同时，他真的很喜欢敏，所以尹有他的孩子。提高公民的瓶子经过改进的视力恢复操作，未婚妻来自美国云辉苏惠回现在知道需要做他们的假期已经结束了他的身边。终于恢复了视线之后，闵发现了所有的事实，发现她喜欢尹熙，并且拜访她。
